seed_expert_discoveries.project: Best Model For The Use Case
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Practical benchmark and selection guide: Opus 4.7 for front-end coding, GPT 5.5 xHigh for back-end, Flash 3.5 for visual understanding, DeepSeek Flash for cheap tasks, Seedance 2.0 for video, GPT Image-2.0 for images, Flash Live for voice, Gemini 3.1 Pro for writing, Grok 4.3 for real-time.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: RL as learning from interventions and counterfactuals
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Mental framework explaining why RL outperforms supervised learning via interventions and counterfactuals; world modeling + RL needed for better hypothesis and truth-seeking beyond scaling; references adversarial world models.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Unifies long-term and short-term memory into end-to-end training for agents; agent learns compression from working memory to persistent storage and retrieval, outperforming modular designs with heuristic controllers for long-horizon reasoning.

global_discoveries.project: Hierarchical and Hybrid Memory Architectures for Agents
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Promising approaches include hierarchical tiers (short/mid/long-term with promotion/compression), hybrid vector + knowledge graphs, summarization/compression, episodic/semantic separation, and Memory OS concepts to overcome context window dilution and weak long-term recall in agents.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Unopinionated terminal multiplexer for managing multiple Codex/Claude agents side-by-side with visual notifications when agents complete tasks.
near_misses.reason: Mentions a GitHub repo but lacks deep technical innovation details or benchmarks in the post.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Median coding agent requests use 96k tokens input; half exceed 128k due to system prompts, tools, and history loaded into KV cache, shifting bottlenecks to HBM capacity/bandwidth.
near_misses.reason: Insightful on efficiency/memory but not a new framework, repo, or actionable pattern.

notes: Past 24 hours yielded limited high-signal technical innovations from seed experts or global searches. Focused on practical model guidance, RL/world models, and memory architectures as the strongest relevant items. No major new open-source repos or frameworks surfaced meeting strict criteria.
